eligibility_rules.occupation: Farmer, FPO Member, PACS Member, Agri Entrepreneur or Cooperative

benefits: Provides medium and long-term financing for agriculture infrastructure projects.
Offers interest subvention on eligible loans.
Supports construction of warehouses, cold storage, grading and processing units.
Encourages post-harvest management and value addition.
Facilitates credit guarantee support for eligible borrowers.
application_steps: Visit the Agriculture Infrastructure Fund portal.
Register as an eligible applicant.
Submit project proposal along with required documents.
Select the preferred lending institution.
Complete verification and loan appraisal process.
Receive loan approval and implement the infrastructure project.
summary_text: The Agriculture Infrastructure Fund is a Central Sector financing facility that supports farmers, FPOs, cooperatives and agri-entrepreneurs in developing post-harvest management infrastructure and community farming assets through affordable institutional credit.

benefits: Provides annual income support of ₹6,000 in three equal installments.
Amount is directly transferred to the beneficiary's bank account through DBT.
Supports small and marginal farming households in meeting agricultural expenses.
Simple online beneficiary status and eKYC facilities are available.
No intermediary involvement in benefit transfer.
application_steps: Visit the PM-KISAN portal or nearest Common Service Centre.
Complete beneficiary registration with Aadhaar details.
Submit land ownership and bank account information.
Complete Aadhaar-based eKYC.
Application is verified by the State Government.
Eligible beneficiaries receive installments directly into their bank account.
summary_text: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi is a Central Sector income support scheme that provides eligible landholding farmer families with ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments through Direct Benefit Transfer to assist with agricultural and household expenses.

benefits: Provides a unified online national agricultural market for transparent trading.
Enables better price discovery through competitive electronic bidding.
Facilitates online payment directly to farmers.
Expands market access beyond local mandis.
Reduces intermediaries and improves transparency in agricultural trade.
required_documents: Farmer Registration or FPO Details (if applicable)
application_steps: Visit the e-NAM portal or nearest integrated mandi.
Complete farmer or trader registration.
Submit identity and bank account details.
Get verification from the concerned mandi authority.
Start listing produce for online trading.
Receive payment directly into the registered bank account after successful trade.
summary_text: e-NAM is a pan-India electronic agricultural trading platform that integrates APMC mandis into a unified national market, enabling transparent price discovery, wider market access, and digital payments for farmers.

benefits: Supports state-specific agricultural development initiatives.
Promotes sustainable farming and improved agricultural productivity.
Encourages adoption of modern agricultural technologies.
Provides financial assistance for innovative agriculture projects.
Supports infrastructure creation and value chain development in agriculture.
application_steps: Contact the District Agriculture Office or State Agriculture Department.
Identify the eligible RKVY component applicable to the applicant.
Submit the prescribed application form with supporting documents.
Department verifies eligibility and project proposal.
Approval is granted by the competent authority.
Financial assistance is released as per scheme guidelines.
summary_text: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY) is a Centrally Sponsored Scheme that supports states in implementing agriculture development projects aimed at improving productivity, infrastructure, sustainability, and farmer income.

benefits: Provides financial assistance to eligible OBC, EBC and DNT students.
Covers tuition fees and other approved academic expenses.
Supports continuation of education in schools and higher educational institutions.
Promotes access to quality education for socially and economically disadvantaged students.
Scholarship amount is transferred through Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT).
application_steps: Visit the National Scholarship Portal.
Register using Aadhaar and mobile number.
Select the PM YASASVI Scholarship scheme.
Upload all required documents.
Submit the application for institute and state verification.
Track scholarship status through the portal.
summary_text: PM Young Achievers Scholarship Award Scheme for Vibrant India (PM YASASVI) is an umbrella scholarship scheme of the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment that provides financial assistance to eligible OBC, EBC and DNT students pursuing school and higher education.

benefits: Provides scholarship support to girl students pursuing technical education.
Financial assistance is provided through Direct Benefit Transfer.
Supports tuition fees and incidental educational expenses.
Encourages higher education among women in AICTE-approved institutions.
Available for eligible Degree and Diploma programmes.
application_steps: Visit the AICTE Pragati & Saksham Scholarship portal.
Complete student registration.
Fill in academic and personal details.
Upload the required documents.
Submit the application for institute verification.
Track scholarship status online.
summary_text: The AICTE Pragati Scholarship Scheme supports meritorious girl students admitted to AICTE-approved technical institutions by providing financial assistance to help them pursue diploma and degree programmes.

benefits: Provides financial assistance to specially-abled students pursuing technical education.
Supports tuition fees and incidental educational expenses.
Scholarship amount is transferred directly through DBT.
Encourages inclusive access to AICTE-approved technical institutions.
Available for eligible Degree and Diploma programmes.
application_steps: Visit the AICTE Pragati & Saksham Scholarship portal.
Register using the required credentials.
Fill in personal and academic details.
Upload disability certificate and supporting documents.
Submit the application for institute verification.
Track scholarship status online.
summary_text: The AICTE Saksham Scholarship Scheme provides financial assistance to specially-abled students pursuing technical diploma or degree programmes in AICTE-approved institutions to promote inclusive higher education.

benefits: Provides annual scholarship to meritorious students pursuing Natural and Basic Sciences.
Encourages talented students to pursue careers in scientific research.
Supports undergraduate and postgraduate education in eligible science courses.
Promotes excellence in science and innovation.
Scholarship is disbursed directly to eligible beneficiaries.
application_steps: Visit the INSPIRE Scholarship portal.
Register with the required details.
Complete the online scholarship application.
Upload academic and identity documents.
Submit the application for verification.
Track application status through the portal.
summary_text: The INSPIRE Scholarship for Higher Education (SHE), implemented by the Department of Science and Technology, supports meritorious students pursuing higher education in Natural and Basic Sciences and encourages them to build careers in research and innovation.

benefits: Provides cash incentive to eligible pregnant and lactating women through Direct Benefit Transfer.
Promotes proper nutrition and adequate rest during pregnancy and after childbirth.
Encourages institutional healthcare and maternal well-being.
Helps compensate for wage loss during pregnancy.
Supports improved health outcomes for both mother and child.
application_steps: Visit the nearest Anganwadi Centre or approved Health Centre.
Register the pregnancy under PMMVY.
Submit the required documents.
Complete verification by the concerned authority.
Receive benefit installments through Direct Benefit Transfer.
Track application status through the PMMVY portal where applicable.
summary_text: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY) is a maternity benefit scheme that provides financial assistance to eligible pregnant women and lactating mothers to improve maternal health, nutrition, and childcare through Direct Benefit Transfer.

benefits: Promotes the survival, protection and education of the girl child.
Encourages higher enrolment and retention of girls in schools.
Supports awareness campaigns against gender discrimination.
Promotes equal opportunities and empowerment of girls.
Strengthens community participation for improving child sex ratio.
required_documents: Birth Certificate of the Girl Child
Aadhaar Card of Parent or Guardian
application_steps: Contact the District Women and Child Development Office or local Anganwadi Centre.
Enroll under eligible activities or linked government initiatives.
Submit the required documents.
Verification is carried out by the concerned authority.
Avail benefits and awareness programmes offered under the scheme.
Follow instructions issued by the implementing district authority.
summary_text: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao is a flagship Government of India initiative aimed at improving the child sex ratio, ensuring the survival and education of the girl child, and promoting gender equality through coordinated awareness and welfare interventions.

benefits: Provides integrated support and assistance to women affected by violence.
Offers emergency medical assistance and psychological counselling.
Provides legal aid and legal counselling services.
Facilitates temporary shelter through linked institutions where required.
Assists women in filing police complaints and accessing government support services.
application_steps: Visit the nearest One Stop Centre or contact Women Helpline 181.
Provide basic personal and incident details.
Submit available supporting documents if requested.
Receive immediate counselling, legal and medical assistance.
The concerned authorities coordinate further support and rehabilitation.
Track case progress through the assigned case worker.
summary_text: The One Stop Centre (Sakhi) Scheme provides integrated support and assistance to women affected by violence under one roof, including medical aid, police facilitation, legal assistance, psycho-social counselling and temporary shelter support.

benefits: Provides a high-interest long-term savings scheme for the girl child.
Offers tax benefits under applicable provisions of the Income Tax Act.
Encourages parents and guardians to build financial security for girls.
Supports future education and marriage-related expenses.
Interest earned and maturity amount are subject to applicable government rules and tax benefits.
required_documents: Birth Certificate of the Girl Child
Aadhaar Card of Parent or Guardian
application_steps: Visit an authorized Post Office or participating bank.
Fill out the Sukanya Samriddhi Account opening form.
Submit the required identity and birth documents.
Make the initial minimum deposit.
Receive the account passbook after successful verification.
Continue deposits as per scheme guidelines until the permitted period.
summary_text: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana is a Government of India small savings scheme designed to encourage long-term savings for the education and future financial security of the girl child through attractive interest rates and tax benefits.

benefits: Provides seed funding for proof of concept, prototype development, product trials and market entry.
Supports startups through eligible incubators recognized under the scheme.
Facilitates access to early-stage capital that is otherwise difficult to obtain.
Encourages innovation and commercialization of technology-driven solutions.
Strengthens the startup ecosystem by supporting high-potential entrepreneurs.
required_documents: Business Pitch Deck or Project Proposal
application_steps: Visit the Startup India portal.
Register the startup and complete the Seed Fund application.
Select an eligible incubator and submit the business proposal.
Upload the required documents.
Present the startup before the incubator evaluation committee if shortlisted.
Receive funding upon approval as per scheme guidelines.
summary_text: The Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS) provides financial assistance to eligible startups through incubators for proof of concept, prototype development, product trials, market entry and commercialization of innovative business ideas.

benefits: Provides bank loans for setting up greenfield enterprises.
Supports entrepreneurship among SC/ST borrowers and women entrepreneurs.
Offers handholding support during business establishment.
Covers manufacturing, services, trading and allied sectors.
Facilitates institutional credit for first-time entrepreneurs.
required_documents: Caste Certificate (for SC/ST applicants, if applicable)
application_steps: Visit the Stand-Up India portal.
Complete the online registration and application.
Prepare and upload the business proposal with supporting documents.
Select the preferred bank branch.
Participate in loan appraisal and verification.
Receive loan sanction and disbursement upon approval.
summary_text: Stand-Up India facilitates institutional credit for women entrepreneurs and SC/ST entrepreneurs to establish greenfield enterprises in manufacturing, services, trading and allied sectors through scheduled commercial banks.

eligibility_rules.occupation: Entrepreneur, Small Business Owner or Self-Employed Individual

benefits: Provides collateral-free loans to micro and small enterprises.
Offers financial assistance under Shishu, Kishore and Tarun loan categories.
Supports business expansion, equipment purchase and working capital needs.
Encourages self-employment and entrepreneurship.
Loans are provided through banks, NBFCs and Micro Finance Institutions as per RBI guidelines.
application_steps: Visit a participating bank, NBFC or Micro Finance Institution.
Choose the appropriate Mudra loan category.
Fill out the application form.
Submit the required documents along with the business proposal.
The lending institution verifies the application and assesses creditworthiness.
Loan is sanctioned and disbursed upon approval.
summary_text: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY) provides collateral-free institutional credit to micro and small businesses engaged in manufacturing, trading, services and allied agricultural activities, promoting entrepreneurship and employment generation.

eligibility_rules.occupation: Student, Job Seeker or Unemployed Youth

benefits: Provides industry-relevant skill development training.
Offers certification aligned with National Skills Qualification Framework (NSQF).
Improves employability through placement assistance and career support.
Provides Recognition of Prior Learning (RPL) for experienced workers.
Training is delivered through approved Skill India training centres.
application_steps: Visit the Skill India or PMKVY portal.
Locate the nearest approved training centre.
Register for the preferred skill course.
Submit the required documents for verification.
Complete the training and assessment.
Receive certification and placement support after successful completion.
summary_text: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY) is the flagship skill development initiative of the Government of India that provides industry-oriented training, certification and placement support to youth for improved employability.

benefits: Provides financial assistance for setting up new micro-enterprises in manufacturing and service sectors.
Offers government subsidy linked to eligible project cost.
Facilitates institutional credit through participating banks.
Promotes self-employment opportunities in rural and urban areas.
Supports entrepreneurship development through mandatory training.
application_steps: Visit the PMEGP e-Portal.
Complete online registration and fill the application form.
Upload the required documents and project report.
Application is scrutinized by the implementing agency.
Attend Entrepreneurship Development Programme (EDP) training after approval.
Loan is sanctioned by the bank and subsidy is released as per scheme guidelines.
summary_text: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP) is a credit-linked subsidy scheme implemented by the Ministry of MSME to generate self-employment opportunities by establishing new micro-enterprises in manufacturing and service sectors.

scheme_name: Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises
benefits: Facilitates collateral-free credit for eligible Micro and Small Enterprises.
Provides credit guarantee cover to lending institutions.
Improves access to institutional finance for new and existing businesses.
Encourages entrepreneurship and MSME growth.
Reduces the need for third-party guarantees on eligible loans.
application_steps: Approach a Member Lending Institution participating in the CGTMSE scheme.
Apply for an eligible collateral-free business loan.
Submit the required business and identity documents.
The lending institution evaluates the loan application.
Upon sanction, the loan is covered under the CGTMSE guarantee mechanism.
Utilize the sanctioned loan as per approved business requirements.
summary_text: The Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises (CGTMSE) provides credit guarantee support to eligible lending institutions, enabling collateral-free loans to Micro and Small Enterprises and improving access to formal finance.

scheme_name: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana

eligibility_rules.occupation: Economically Vulnerable Family (as per eligible beneficiary database)

benefits: Provides health insurance coverage of up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
Offers cashless and paperless treatment at empanelled public and private hospitals.
Covers pre-hospitalization and post-hospitalization expenses as per scheme guidelines.
Includes treatment for a wide range of medical procedures across multiple specialties.
Portable benefits allow eligible beneficiaries to receive treatment anywhere in India at empanelled hospitals.
required_documents: Family Identification or Eligible Beneficiary Proof
application_steps: Check eligibility through the Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY portal or nearest Common Service Centre.
Visit an empanelled hospital with the required identification documents.
Complete beneficiary verification.
Receive approval for cashless treatment.
Undergo treatment without paying eligible hospitalization expenses.
Track beneficiary details and hospital records through the official portal.
summary_text: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY) is the Government of India's flagship health assurance scheme providing eligible families with cashless hospitalization coverage of up to ₹5 lakh per year at empanelled hospitals across the country.

benefits: Provides financial assistance for construction of pucca houses in rural areas.
Supports beneficiaries with assistance for basic housing infrastructure.
Converges with schemes for sanitation, electricity and LPG wherever applicable.
Direct Benefit Transfer ensures transparent release of installments.
Promotes safe and durable housing for eligible rural families.
application_steps: Verify eligibility through the Gram Panchayat or local rural development office.
Ensure beneficiary selection under the SECC-based eligibility process.
Complete Aadhaar and bank account verification.
Receive installment-wise financial assistance through Direct Benefit Transfer.
Construct the house according to prescribed guidelines.
Physical verification is conducted before release of subsequent installments.
summary_text: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G) provides financial assistance to eligible rural households for constructing durable pucca houses with basic amenities, aiming to achieve 'Housing for All' in rural India.

benefits: Provides financial assistance for construction, purchase or enhancement of houses in urban areas.
Offers interest subsidy on eligible home loans under the applicable component of the scheme.
Promotes affordable housing for eligible urban families.
Supports housing projects through partnership with States, Union Territories and Urban Local Bodies.
Encourages ownership of pucca houses with basic civic amenities.
application_steps: Visit the PMAY-Urban portal or nearest Common Service Centre.
Check eligibility and complete beneficiary registration.
Submit the application along with required documents.
Application is verified by the Urban Local Body.
Eligible beneficiaries receive approval under the applicable PMAY-U component.
Financial assistance or interest subsidy is released as per scheme guidelines.
summary_text: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Urban (PMAY-U) is a flagship housing initiative of the Government of India that promotes affordable housing for eligible urban households through financial assistance, credit-linked subsidy and housing development projects.

eligibility_rules.occupation: Indian Citizen with Savings Bank Account

benefits: Provides guaranteed monthly pension after attaining 60 years of age.
Offers multiple pension options based on the subscriber's contribution.
Encourages long-term retirement savings for workers in the unorganized sector.
Contributions are automatically deducted from the linked savings bank account.
Provides benefits to the spouse and nominee as per scheme provisions.
application_steps: Visit a participating bank or Post Office.
Fill out the Atal Pension Yojana registration form.
Submit the required KYC documents.
Choose the desired monthly pension amount.
Authorize auto-debit from the linked savings account.
Receive confirmation of successful enrollment.
summary_text: Atal Pension Yojana (APY) is a Government of India pension scheme that encourages retirement savings by providing subscribers with a guaranteed monthly pension after the age of 60 based on their chosen contribution level.

scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana

eligibility_rules.occupation: Indian Citizen with Savings Bank Account

benefits: Provides life insurance coverage of ₹2 lakh in case of death due to any cause.
Offers affordable annual premium with auto-debit facility.
Policy is renewable every year subject to scheme guidelines.
Easy enrollment through participating banks and insurance companies.
Financial security for the nominee in case of the insured person's death.
application_steps: Visit a participating bank or enroll through internet/mobile banking if available.
Fill out the PMJJBY enrollment form.
Submit the required KYC documents.
Provide consent for annual premium auto-debit.
Bank verifies the application and activates the insurance cover.
Receive confirmation of successful enrollment.
summary_text: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY) is a Government-backed life insurance scheme providing ₹2 lakh life cover at an affordable annual premium to eligible bank account holders.

eligibility_rules.occupation: Indian Citizen with Savings Bank Account

benefits: Provides accidental death and disability insurance coverage.
Offers insurance at a highly affordable annual premium.
Provides ₹2 lakh coverage for accidental death or total permanent disability.
Provides ₹1 lakh coverage for partial permanent disability.
Enrollment and premium payment are simplified through bank auto-debit.
application_steps: Visit a participating bank or enroll through digital banking channels.
Complete the PMSBY enrollment form.
Submit the required KYC documents.
Authorize annual premium auto-debit.
Application is verified by the bank.
Insurance coverage becomes active after successful enrollment.
summary_text: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY) is a Government-backed accident insurance scheme providing affordable accidental death and disability coverage to eligible bank account holders across India.

benefits: Provides social assistance to eligible elderly, widows and persons with disabilities.
Offers financial support through various pension and family benefit components.
Benefits are transferred directly into the beneficiary's bank account.
Supports vulnerable households living below the prescribed eligibility criteria.
Implemented in coordination with State Governments.
required_documents: Relevant Eligibility Certificate (Widow/Disability/Age Proof, if applicable)
application_steps: Visit the Gram Panchayat, Block Office or Urban Local Body.
Obtain and fill the prescribed application form.
Submit the required supporting documents.
Application is verified by the competent authority.
Eligible beneficiaries are approved under the relevant NSAP component.
Financial assistance is credited directly to the beneficiary's bank account.
summary_text: The National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP) is a social welfare programme of the Government of India that provides financial assistance to eligible elderly persons, widows, persons with disabilities and bereaved families through various pension and assistance schemes.

scheme_name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme
benefits: Provides monthly pension assistance to eligible senior citizens.
Supports elderly persons belonging to economically vulnerable households.
Central assistance is provided along with additional support from many State Governments.
Benefits are transferred directly into the beneficiary's bank account.
Promotes financial security and social protection for senior citizens.
application_steps: Apply through the Gram Panchayat, Municipality or designated welfare office.
Submit the completed application form along with required documents.
The concerned authority verifies age and eligibility.
Application is approved under the NSAP framework.
Pension is sanctioned and credited directly to the beneficiary's bank account.
Beneficiaries can periodically verify payment status with the local authority.
summary_text: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS) is a component of the National Social Assistance Programme that provides monthly pension assistance to eligible senior citizens from economically vulnerable households to improve their social security.

scheme_name: Assistance to Disabled Persons for Purchase/Fitting of Aids and Appliances (ADIP)
benefits: Provides financial assistance for purchasing scientifically manufactured assistive devices.
Improves mobility, communication, education and independent living for persons with disabilities.
Supports distribution of aids such as wheelchairs, hearing aids, prosthetics and assistive technologies.
Helps reduce the impact of disability and improve quality of life.
Implemented through authorized implementing agencies across India.
application_steps: Contact the nearest ADIP implementing agency or District Social Welfare Office.
Submit the prescribed application form with supporting documents.
Undergo medical assessment if required.
Eligibility is verified by the implementing agency.
Approved assistive devices are sanctioned and distributed.
Collect the aids and receive guidance on their usage.
summary_text: The Assistance to Disabled Persons for Purchase/Fitting of Aids and Appliances (ADIP) Scheme provides financial assistance to eligible persons with disabilities for obtaining modern, scientifically designed assistive devices that improve mobility, communication and overall quality of life.

benefits: Provides a nationally recognized Unique Disability ID Card.
Creates a single digital identity for accessing disability-related services.
Simplifies access to government welfare schemes and benefits.
Reduces the need for multiple disability certificates.
Maintains a centralized database of persons with disabilities.
required_documents: Disability Certificate or Medical Assessment Records
application_steps: Visit the UDID portal.
Register using the required personal details.
Complete the online application form.
Upload the required documents.
Medical authority verifies the disability details.
Download or receive the UDID Card after approval.
summary_text: The Unique Disability ID (UDID) Project provides persons with disabilities a standardized digital identity card that enables easier access to government schemes, services and benefits through a centralized national database.

benefits: Supports rehabilitation services for persons with disabilities through registered organizations.
Promotes inclusive education, therapy, vocational training and community-based rehabilitation.
Facilitates access to counselling, special education and skill development.
Encourages equal opportunities, social justice and empowerment of persons with disabilities.
Strengthens rehabilitation infrastructure through Government-supported institutions and NGOs.
application_steps: Contact the nearest organization implementing DDRS or District Disability Rehabilitation Centre.
Submit the prescribed application along with supporting documents.
Complete medical or disability assessment where required.
Eligibility is verified by the implementing organization.
Approved applicants are enrolled in the appropriate rehabilitation services.
Receive rehabilitation, therapy, education or vocational support as applicable.
summary_text: The Deendayal Divyangjan Rehabilitation Scheme (DDRS) supports rehabilitation, education, vocational training and community-based services for persons with disabilities through financial assistance to eligible implementing organizations across India.

scheme_name: Support for Marginalized Individuals for Livelihood and Enterprise (SMILE)

eligibility_rules.occupation: Transgender Person or Person Engaged in Begging

benefits: Provides comprehensive rehabilitation and welfare support for transgender persons.
Supports rehabilitation of persons engaged in the act of begging.
Offers skill development, livelihood opportunities and entrepreneurship support.
Facilitates healthcare, counselling, education and shelter services.
Promotes social inclusion and long-term economic rehabilitation.
required_documents: Transgender Certificate or relevant eligibility proof (where applicable)
application_steps: Visit the National Portal for Transgender Persons or contact the District Social Welfare Office.
Register under the relevant SMILE component.
Submit the required documents.
Eligibility is verified by the implementing authority.
Receive approval for rehabilitation, livelihood or welfare assistance.
Avail the approved services and benefits under the scheme.
summary_text: SMILE (Support for Marginalized Individuals for Livelihood and Enterprise) is an umbrella scheme of the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment that provides rehabilitation, healthcare, education, skill development and livelihood support to transgender persons and persons engaged in the act of begging.

benefits: Provides one-time financial assistance to the bereaved family after the death of the primary breadwinner.
Supports Below Poverty Line (BPL) households facing sudden financial hardship.
Financial assistance is transferred directly to the eligible beneficiary's bank account.
Implemented under the National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP).
Helps families meet immediate financial needs after the loss of the earning member.
required_documents: Death Certificate of the Primary Breadwinner
BPL Certificate or Eligible Household Proof
application_steps: Visit the Gram Panchayat, Block Office or District Social Welfare Office.
Obtain and complete the NFBS application form.
Submit the required documents along with the death certificate.
The concerned authority verifies eligibility under NSAP guidelines.
Application is approved by the competent authority.
Financial assistance is credited directly to the beneficiary's bank account.
summary_text: The National Family Benefit Scheme (NFBS) is a component of the National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP) that provides one-time financial assistance to Below Poverty Line (BPL) households upon the death of the family's primary breadwinner, helping them cope with immediate financial distress.

benefits: Provides annual scholarships to meritorious students from economically weaker sections.
Helps reduce dropout rates after Class VIII.
Encourages continuation of secondary and higher secondary education.
Scholarship is transferred directly through Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT).
Promotes equal educational opportunities for deserving students.
application_steps: Appear in the NMMS selection examination conducted by the respective State or Union Territory.
Qualifying students register on the National Scholarship Portal.
Upload the required documents.
Application is verified by the school and State authorities.
Approved students receive scholarship through Direct Benefit Transfer.
Renew the scholarship annually by fulfilling academic performance requirements.
summary_text: The National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship Scheme (NMMS) provides financial assistance to meritorious students from economically weaker sections to encourage them to continue secondary and higher secondary education and reduce dropout rates.

scheme_name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship for College and University Students
benefits: Provides annual financial assistance to meritorious students pursuing higher education.
Encourages continuation of undergraduate and postgraduate studies.
Scholarship amount is transferred directly through Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT).
Supports students studying in recognized colleges and universities.
Renewable subject to satisfactory academic performance and scheme guidelines.
application_steps: Register on the National Scholarship Portal.
Select the Central Sector Scholarship Scheme.
Fill in personal and academic details.
Upload the required documents.
Submit the application for institute and state verification.
Track scholarship status through the National Scholarship Portal.
summary_text: The Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship for College and University Students, implemented by the Ministry of Education, provides financial assistance to meritorious students from economically weaker families pursuing undergraduate and postgraduate education in recognized institutions.

scheme_name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
benefits: Provides financial assistance to Scheduled Caste students pursuing post-matric education.
Covers maintenance allowance, tuition fees and other approved educational expenses.
Supports continuation of higher education in recognized institutions.
Scholarship amount is transferred directly to eligible beneficiaries through DBT.
Reduces financial barriers for economically disadvantaged SC students.
application_steps: Visit the National Scholarship Portal or the designated State scholarship portal.
Register and complete the scholarship application.
Upload the required supporting documents.
Submit the application for institute and department verification.
Track the application status online.
Receive the scholarship through Direct Benefit Transfer upon approval.
summary_text: The Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students provides financial assistance to eligible Scheduled Caste students pursuing education beyond Class X by supporting tuition fees, maintenance allowance and other approved academic expenses.

scheme_name: Post Matric Scholarship for OBC Students
benefits: Provides financial assistance to eligible OBC students pursuing post-matric education.
Supports payment of tuition fees, maintenance allowance and other approved academic expenses.
Encourages continuation of higher education among Other Backward Classes.
Scholarship amount is transferred directly to the beneficiary through Direct Benefit Transfer.
Reduces financial barriers for economically disadvantaged students.
application_steps: Visit the National Scholarship Portal.
Register and select the Post Matric Scholarship for OBC Students.
Fill in the application form and upload the required documents.
Submit the application for institute and state verification.
Track the application status online.
Receive the scholarship through Direct Benefit Transfer upon approval.
summary_text: The Post Matric Scholarship for OBC Students provides financial assistance to eligible Other Backward Class students pursuing studies beyond Class X by supporting tuition fees, maintenance allowance and other approved educational expenses.

scheme_name: Top Class Education Scheme for SC Students
benefits: Provides full tuition fee support for eligible SC students studying in notified premier institutions.
Offers living expenses, books and stationery allowance as per scheme guidelines.
Provides one-time assistance for purchase of a computer or laptop where applicable.
Encourages access to quality higher education in premier institutions.
Scholarship is disbursed directly to eligible beneficiaries through Direct Benefit Transfer.
application_steps: Register on the National Scholarship Portal.
Select the Top Class Education Scheme for SC Students.
Complete the online application form.
Upload the required documents.
Submit the application for institute and ministry verification.
Receive scholarship benefits after approval through Direct Benefit Transfer.
summary_text: The Top Class Education Scheme for SC Students provides comprehensive financial assistance to eligible Scheduled Caste students admitted to premier institutions in India by covering tuition fees, living expenses and other approved educational costs.

eligibility_rules.occupation: Micro, Small or Medium Enterprise Owner

benefits: Provides technology upgradation and modernization support for MSMEs.
Offers grievance redressal and handholding through MSME Champions Control Rooms.
Facilitates quality improvement, competitiveness and business growth.
Supports enterprises in adopting digital tools and best practices.
Provides guidance on government schemes, market access and financing opportunities.
application_steps: Visit the MSME Champions portal.
Register the enterprise using Udyam Registration details.
Select the required support or grievance category.
Upload the necessary business documents.
Submit the application for review by the concerned authority.
Receive guidance, assistance or resolution through the MSME Champions platform.
summary_text: The MSME Champions Scheme strengthens Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises by providing technology support, grievance redressal, capacity building, business mentoring and easier access to government services through an integrated digital platform.

scheme_name: SFURTI (Scheme of Fund for Regeneration of Traditional Industries)

eligibility_rules.occupation: Traditional Artisan, Self Help Group, Cooperative or Producer Organization

benefits: Promotes regeneration and modernization of traditional industries.
Provides financial assistance for cluster development and common infrastructure.
Supports skill development, design improvement and product diversification.
Enhances market access and branding for traditional products.
Improves income and employment opportunities for artisans.
application_steps: Approach the designated Nodal Agency or Implementing Agency.
Prepare and submit the cluster development proposal.
Submit all required supporting documents.
Proposal is evaluated and approved by the competent authority.
Financial assistance is released as per approved project milestones.
Implement the cluster activities and utilize funds according to scheme guidelines.
summary_text: SFURTI (Scheme of Fund for Regeneration of Traditional Industries) is a Ministry of MSME initiative that supports cluster-based development of traditional industries by improving infrastructure, skills, market access and competitiveness of artisans and rural enterprises.

scheme_name: ASPIRE (A Scheme for Promotion of Innovation, Rural Industries and Entrepreneurship)

eligibility_rules.occupation: Entrepreneur, Startup, Rural Enterprise or MSME

benefits: Promotes innovation and entrepreneurship through business incubators.
Supports establishment of technology and livelihood business incubators.
Encourages employment generation in rural and agro-based industries.
Facilitates mentoring, capacity building and enterprise development.
Strengthens the rural startup ecosystem through institutional support.
application_steps: Visit the Ministry of MSME or designated implementing agency.
Identify an eligible incubator or implementing institution.
Submit the prescribed application along with the project proposal.
Upload or provide the required supporting documents.
Application is evaluated by the competent authority.
Approved applicants receive assistance under the applicable ASPIRE component.
summary_text: ASPIRE (A Scheme for Promotion of Innovation, Rural Industries and Entrepreneurship) is a Ministry of MSME initiative that promotes innovation, entrepreneurship and employment generation by supporting business incubators and rural enterprises across India.

benefits: Provides a guaranteed monthly pension of ₹3,000 after attaining 60 years of age.
Requires matching contribution from the Government of India.
Encourages long-term retirement savings among unorganized sector workers.
Offers family pension benefits to the spouse as per scheme guidelines.
Enrollment is available through Common Service Centres across the country.
application_steps: Visit the nearest Common Service Centre (CSC).
Provide Aadhaar, bank account and mobile number details.
Complete biometric authentication and enrollment.
Choose the applicable monthly contribution.
Authorize auto-debit from the linked bank account.
Receive the pension card and enrollment confirmation.
summary_text: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maandhan (PM-SYM) is a voluntary contributory pension scheme that provides unorganized sector workers with a guaranteed monthly pension of ₹3,000 after the age of 60 through joint contributions from the subscriber and the Government of India.

benefits: Provides cash assistance to eligible pregnant women for institutional delivery.
Promotes safe motherhood and reduces maternal and neonatal mortality.
Encourages delivery at government and accredited health institutions.
Supports antenatal and postnatal healthcare services.
Provides incentives to Accredited Social Health Activists (ASHAs) for facilitating institutional deliveries.
application_steps: Register pregnancy at the nearest Government Health Centre or Anganwadi Centre.
Complete antenatal check-ups as advised by healthcare providers.
Submit the required documents for verification.
Opt for delivery at an eligible government or accredited health institution.
Verification is completed by the health authorities.
Cash assistance is transferred to the beneficiary through Direct Benefit Transfer.
summary_text: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY) is a safe motherhood intervention under the National Health Mission that promotes institutional deliveries among pregnant women through cash assistance and improved access to maternal healthcare services.

benefits: Provides quality generic medicines at affordable prices through Janaushadhi Kendras.
Reduces out-of-pocket healthcare expenditure for citizens.
Ensures availability of essential medicines across the country.
Promotes awareness and usage of quality generic medicines.
Supports establishment of Janaushadhi Kendras by eligible entrepreneurs and institutions.
required_documents: Valid Prescription from Registered Medical Practitioner (for prescription medicines)
application_steps: Locate the nearest Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Kendra.
Consult a registered medical practitioner and obtain a valid prescription if required.
Visit the Kendra with the prescription.
Purchase the prescribed generic medicines at subsidized prices.
Collect the bill and medicine information from the pharmacist.
Follow the prescribed dosage and medical advice.
summary_text: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana (PMBJP) is a Government of India initiative that provides quality generic medicines at affordable prices through a nationwide network of Janaushadhi Kendras, making healthcare more accessible and affordable.

eligibility_rules.occupation: Pregnant Woman or Sick Newborn Infant

benefits: Provides completely free and cashless delivery services at eligible government health institutions.
Offers free treatment, medicines, diagnostics and blood where required.
Provides free diet during hospital stay for eligible mothers.
Covers free transport from home to health institution, referral transport and drop-back after delivery.
Provides free treatment for sick newborns up to 30 days after birth.
application_steps: Register the pregnancy at the nearest Government Health Centre.
Visit an eligible government hospital for delivery or newborn treatment.
Submit the required identification and registration documents.
Receive eligible services free of cost under JSSK.
Avail referral transport and follow-up services where applicable.
Collect discharge records and continue postnatal care as advised.
summary_text: Janani Shishu Suraksha Karyakram (JSSK) is an initiative under the National Health Mission that provides free and cashless maternity services and healthcare for sick newborns at government health institutions, reducing out-of-pocket expenditure for families.

eligibility_rules.occupation: Patient with Kidney Disease Requiring Dialysis

benefits: Provides free or highly subsidized dialysis services at identified government hospitals.
Improves access to life-saving dialysis treatment for patients with kidney failure.
Reduces the financial burden associated with long-term dialysis care.
Strengthens dialysis infrastructure in district hospitals through public-private partnership.
Promotes equitable access to renal healthcare across the country.
application_steps: Visit a government hospital offering dialysis services under the programme.
Consult the treating nephrologist or physician.
Submit the required medical and identity documents.
Complete patient registration at the dialysis unit.
Schedule dialysis sessions as advised by the treating doctor.
Continue treatment and periodic medical review as prescribed.
summary_text: The National Dialysis Programme, implemented under the National Health Mission, aims to provide accessible and affordable dialysis services for patients with kidney disease through government health facilities across India.

eligibility_rules.occupation: Working Woman or Woman Undergoing Professional Training

benefits: Provides safe and affordable hostel accommodation for working women.
Supports women who are employed away from their hometown or residence.
Offers secure residential facilities with basic amenities.
Provides daycare facilities for children in selected hostels where available.
Promotes women's participation in the workforce through safe accommodation.
application_steps: Locate an approved Working Women Hostel in the preferred city.
Submit the prescribed hostel admission application.
Provide employment or training proof along with required documents.
Complete document verification by the hostel management.
Pay the applicable hostel charges as per norms.
Receive accommodation after successful approval.
summary_text: The Working Women Hostel Scheme supports employed women and women undergoing professional training by providing safe, secure and affordable hostel accommodation with essential facilities, enabling greater workforce participation and mobility.

benefits: Provides day-care facilities for children of working mothers.
Offers supplementary nutrition, healthcare and early childhood education.
Ensures a safe and secure environment for children during working hours.
Supports working mothers by reducing childcare-related constraints.
Promotes holistic growth and development of young children.
required_documents: Aadhaar Card of Parent or Guardian
Identity Proof of Parent or Guardian
Employment Proof of Parent or Guardian
application_steps: Identify a registered creche operating under the National Creche Scheme.
Submit the child admission form.
Provide the required identity and employment documents.
Complete verification by the creche management.
Pay the prescribed user charges, if applicable.
Enroll the child and avail day-care services.
summary_text: The National Creche Scheme provides quality day-care services for children up to six years of age, enabling working mothers to pursue employment while ensuring proper nutrition, health care and early childhood development for their children.

benefits: Provides integrated support for women's safety, security and empowerment.
Facilitates access to legal aid, counselling and institutional support services.
Strengthens women-centric service delivery through convergence of multiple welfare initiatives.
Promotes awareness of women's rights and government welfare schemes.
Supports capacity building and empowerment initiatives for women across the country.
application_steps: Approach the District Women and Child Development Office or designated implementation centre.
Identify the relevant Mission Shakti component applicable to the applicant.
Submit the prescribed application with supporting documents where required.
Complete verification by the concerned authority.
Receive approved services or benefits under the relevant component.
Follow up with the implementing authority for status updates if necessary.
summary_text: Mission Shakti is the umbrella scheme of the Ministry of Women and Child Development that integrates initiatives for women's safety, protection and empowerment through institutional support, awareness, capacity building and access to government services.

benefits: Provides community-based support for women's empowerment and awareness.
Facilitates access to education, healthcare, skill development and government welfare schemes.
Promotes digital literacy, financial literacy and leadership among women.
Strengthens convergence between government departments for women-centric services.
Encourages community participation and gender equality at the grassroots level.
application_steps: Visit the nearest Mahila Shakti Kendra or District Women and Child Development Office.
Register for the relevant service or empowerment programme.
Submit the required identity and residence documents.
Complete verification by the implementing authority.
Participate in approved training, awareness or welfare activities.
Avail benefits and support services under the programme.
summary_text: Mahila Shakti Kendra is a Government of India initiative that empowers rural women by improving awareness, access to government services, skill development opportunities and community participation through district and block-level support centres.

benefits: Promotes nutritional improvement among adolescent girls.
Provides nutrition, health education and life skills training.
Supports awareness regarding menstrual hygiene, reproductive health and personal wellbeing.
Encourages continued education, vocational training and skill development.
Facilitates access to health services through convergence with other government programmes.
required_documents: Identity Proof of Parent or Guardian
application_steps: Visit the nearest Anganwadi Centre.
Register under the Scheme for Adolescent Girls.
Submit the required identity and age proof documents.
Complete verification by the Anganwadi Worker or concerned authority.
Participate in nutrition, health and life skills activities.
Receive benefits and services as per scheme guidelines.
summary_text: The Scheme for Adolescent Girls (SAG), implemented by the Ministry of Women and Child Development, aims to improve the nutritional, health and social status of adolescent girls through nutrition support, health education, life skills and awareness programmes.

benefits: Provides internship opportunities in the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology and allied organizations.
Offers practical exposure to Digital India initiatives and e-Governance projects.
Enhances technical, research and policy-related skills.
Provides a stipend to selected interns as per prevailing scheme guidelines.
Offers mentorship from government officials and domain experts.
application_steps: Visit the Digital India or MeitY internship portal when applications are open.
Register and complete the online application form.
Upload the required academic and identity documents.
Submit the application before the specified deadline.
Shortlisted candidates may be contacted for further evaluation.
Selected candidates receive internship confirmation and joining instructions.
summary_text: The Digital India Internship Scheme provides students with an opportunity to gain hands-on experience in Digital India initiatives, public digital infrastructure and e-Governance projects while working with the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology and its organizations.

eligibility_rules.occupation: Farmer, Beekeeper, Farmer Producer Organization or Beekeeping Entrepreneur

benefits: Provides financial assistance for scientific beekeeping and honey production.
Supports establishment and modernization of beekeeping infrastructure.
Promotes skill development and training for beekeepers.
Improves productivity, quality and marketing of honey and other bee products.
Encourages income diversification and pollination support for agriculture.
application_steps: Contact the State Horticulture or Agriculture Department.
Obtain information about eligible components under the mission.
Submit the prescribed application form with required documents.
Complete verification by the implementing authority.
Receive approval and financial assistance under the eligible component.
Implement the approved beekeeping activity and comply with monitoring requirements.
summary_text: The National Beekeeping and Honey Mission (NBHM) promotes scientific beekeeping, honey production, value addition and market development by providing financial assistance, training and infrastructure support to beekeepers and related organizations.

benefits: Promotes organic farming through cluster-based implementation.
Provides financial assistance for organic inputs, certification and capacity building.
Encourages sustainable and eco-friendly agricultural practices.
Supports organic value chains and market linkages.
Helps improve soil health while reducing dependence on chemical fertilizers and pesticides.
required_documents: Land Ownership Records or Cultivation Proof
application_steps: Contact the District Agriculture Office or State Agriculture Department.
Join or form an eligible organic farming cluster.
Submit the prescribed application with supporting documents.
Participate in training and capacity-building programmes.
Receive financial assistance and technical support after approval.
Implement organic farming practices and comply with certification requirements.
summary_text: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY) is a Government of India scheme that promotes cluster-based organic farming by providing financial assistance, certification support, training and market linkages to encourage sustainable agricultural practices.

benefits: Provides financial assistance for the purchase of agricultural machinery and equipment.
Promotes farm mechanization to improve productivity and reduce labor dependency.
Supports establishment of Custom Hiring Centres for small and marginal farmers.
Encourages the use of modern agricultural technologies.
Helps reduce cultivation costs and improve operational efficiency.
required_documents: Land Ownership Records or Cultivation Proof
application_steps: Visit the District Agriculture Office or State Agriculture Department.
Select the eligible agricultural machinery under the scheme.
Submit the prescribed application form with supporting documents.
Complete verification by the concerned authority.
Receive approval for subsidy under the applicable component.
Purchase the machinery and claim the subsidy as per scheme guidelines.
summary_text: The Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization (SMAM) promotes farm mechanization by providing financial assistance for agricultural machinery, Custom Hiring Centres and modern farming technologies, particularly benefiting small and marginal farmers.

benefits: Promotes chemical-free natural farming practices across India.
Provides training and capacity building for farmers adopting natural farming.
Supports sustainable agriculture and long-term soil health improvement.
Encourages reduced dependence on synthetic fertilizers and pesticides.
Enhances environmental sustainability and climate-resilient agriculture.
required_documents: Land Ownership Records or Cultivation Proof
application_steps: Contact the District Agriculture Office or Krishi Vigyan Kendra.
Enroll in the Natural Farming programme under the mission.
Submit the required application form and supporting documents.
Participate in approved training and demonstration programmes.
Adopt natural farming practices as per technical guidelines.
Receive assistance and monitoring under the mission.
summary_text: The National Mission on Natural Farming (NMNF) is a Centrally Sponsored Scheme that promotes sustainable, chemical-free agriculture through farmer training, capacity building, technical support and adoption of natural farming practices across India.

eligibility_rules.occupation: Urban Migrant Worker, Industrial Worker, Student or Urban Poor

benefits: Provides access to affordable rental housing in urban areas.
Improves availability of safe and dignified accommodation for migrant workers and urban poor.
Promotes utilization of vacant government-funded housing and development of new rental housing.
Supports better living conditions near places of employment.
Encourages public-private partnerships for affordable rental housing.
required_documents: Employment Proof or Student Identity Card (where applicable)
application_steps: Locate an Affordable Rental Housing Complex in the preferred city.
Contact the implementing agency or housing provider.
Submit the prescribed rental application with required documents.
Complete identity verification.
Execute the rental agreement as per applicable guidelines.
Occupy the allotted rental accommodation after approval.
summary_text: Affordable Rental Housing Complexes (ARHC) is a sub-scheme under Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana–Urban that provides affordable, dignified rental accommodation to urban migrants, industrial workers, students and other eligible urban poor near their workplaces.

benefits: Provides a single online platform to apply for multiple Central and State Government scholarships.
Enables transparent online application, verification and scholarship tracking.
Facilitates Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) of scholarship amounts to eligible students.
Reduces paperwork through a unified digital scholarship system.
Supports pre-matric, post-matric, merit-based and higher education scholarship schemes.
application_steps: Visit the National Scholarship Portal.
Register using the One-Time Registration (OTR) process.
Select the eligible scholarship scheme.
Upload the required supporting documents.
Submit the application for institute and department verification.
Track application status and scholarship disbursement through the portal.
summary_text: The National Scholarship Portal (NSP) is the Government of India's unified digital platform for applying to, verifying and tracking Central and State scholarship schemes, ensuring transparent processing and Direct Benefit Transfer of scholarship benefits.

eligibility_rules.occupation: Woman or Girl Vulnerable to Trafficking or Commercial Sexual Exploitation

benefits: Provides rescue, rehabilitation and reintegration support for women and girls affected by trafficking.
Offers safe shelter, counselling and legal assistance.
Facilitates vocational training and skill development for sustainable livelihood.
Supports education, healthcare and psychological rehabilitation.
Promotes reintegration into society through institutional and community support.
required_documents: Referral Order or Rescue Report (where applicable)
application_steps: Approach the District Women and Child Development Office or authorized implementing agency.
Complete registration through the designated rehabilitation centre.
Submit the available supporting documents.
Eligibility and case assessment are conducted by the concerned authority.
Receive rehabilitation, counselling and livelihood support under the scheme.
Participate in follow-up rehabilitation and reintegration programmes.
summary_text: The Ujjwala Scheme of the Ministry of Women and Child Development focuses on the prevention of trafficking, rescue, rehabilitation, reintegration and repatriation of women and girls affected by commercial sexual exploitation through institutional support and livelihood assistance.

benefits: Encourages meritorious girl students to pursue education in Science, Technology, Engineering and Mathematics (STEM).
Provides mentoring, counselling and exposure to scientific institutions.
Organizes science camps, workshops and interaction with women scientists.
Promotes participation of girls from underrepresented regions in STEM education.
Builds confidence and career awareness in scientific fields.
application_steps: Apply through the participating school or implementing institution.
Submit the prescribed application form.
Provide the required academic and identity documents.
Selection is carried out as per programme guidelines.
Participate in mentoring sessions, workshops and STEM activities.
Continue participation as per the programme schedule.
summary_text: Vigyan Jyoti is an initiative of the Department of Science and Technology (DST) that encourages girl students to pursue higher education and careers in STEM through mentoring, exposure visits, science camps and academic support.

benefits: Provides recognition through PM Vishwakarma Certificate and ID Card.
Offers basic and advanced skill training with stipend support.
Provides collateral-free concessional loans for business development.
Supports toolkit incentives for eligible artisans.
Facilitates digital transactions, branding and market linkage support.
application_steps: Visit the nearest Common Service Centre (CSC) or apply through the PM Vishwakarma portal.
Complete Aadhaar-based registration and biometric verification.
Submit the required documents and occupation details.
Application is verified by the local verification committee.
Receive PM Vishwakarma Certificate and ID upon approval.
Avail training, toolkit incentive and concessional loan benefits under the scheme.
summary_text: PM Vishwakarma is a Central Sector Scheme that supports traditional artisans and craftspeople by providing recognition, skill training, toolkit incentives, concessional credit, digital empowerment and market linkage to strengthen traditional occupations.

eligibility_rules.occupation: Student, ITI Trainee or Job Seeker

benefits: Provides opportunities for industry-based apprenticeship training.
Enhances employability through practical hands-on work experience.
Offers stipend support as per Apprentices Act and applicable guidelines.
Bridges the gap between academic learning and industry requirements.
Facilitates employment opportunities through industry partnerships.
application_steps: Register on the National Apprenticeship Training portal.
Complete the candidate profile and upload the required documents.
Search and apply for suitable apprenticeship opportunities.
Attend selection or interview conducted by the establishment.
Execute the apprenticeship contract after selection.
Complete the apprenticeship training and receive certification upon successful completion.
summary_text: The National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS) promotes apprenticeship training by encouraging establishments to engage apprentices and providing youth with practical industry experience, skill development and improved employment prospects.

benefits: Provides financial assistance for undergraduate education in recognized institutions across India.
Covers academic fees up to the prescribed ceiling based on the course category.
Provides annual maintenance allowance for hostel, books and other educational expenses.
Supports higher education opportunities for eligible students from Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh.
Scholarship amount is disbursed through the prescribed government mechanism.
application_steps: Register on the PMSSS portal during the admission cycle.
Complete the online application form.
Upload the required academic and identity documents.
Participate in the centralized counselling process.
Accept the allotted institution after seat allocation.
Receive scholarship benefits after successful verification and admission.
summary_text: The Prime Minister's Special Scholarship Scheme (PMSSS), implemented by AICTE, provides financial assistance to eligible students from Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh to pursue undergraduate education in recognized institutions across India.

eligibility_rules.occupation: Farmer, Livestock Farmer or Livestock Entrepreneur

benefits: Promotes sustainable livestock development and entrepreneurship.
Provides financial assistance for eligible livestock, fodder and breed development activities.
Supports poultry, sheep, goat, pig and fodder-based enterprises under approved components.
Encourages scientific livestock management and productivity improvement.
Generates additional income and employment opportunities in the livestock sector.
required_documents: Land or Livestock Ownership Proof (where applicable)
application_steps: Visit the State Animal Husbandry Department or the National Livestock Mission portal.
Identify the eligible component under the scheme.
Submit the prescribed application form with the required documents.
Application is verified by the implementing authority.
Receive approval and financial assistance under the applicable component.
Implement the approved livestock project and comply with monitoring requirements.
summary_text: The National Livestock Mission promotes sustainable growth of the livestock sector by supporting entrepreneurship, breed improvement, fodder development and scientific livestock management through financial assistance and capacity building.

scheme_name: PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana
benefits: Provides Central Financial Assistance for installation of rooftop solar systems on residential houses.
Helps households reduce monthly electricity bills through solar power generation.
Facilitates online application, vendor selection and subsidy tracking.
Promotes clean and renewable energy adoption across the country.
Subsidy is credited directly to the beneficiary's bank account after successful installation and verification.
application_steps: Visit the PM Surya Ghar portal.
Register using the electricity consumer number and mobile number.
Apply for rooftop solar installation and select an approved vendor.
Complete installation and submit details for inspection.
Utility conducts inspection and approves commissioning.
Receive subsidy directly into the registered bank account.
summary_text: PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana is a Government of India initiative that promotes residential rooftop solar installations by providing Central Financial Assistance, enabling households to reduce electricity bills and adopt clean energy.

benefits: Provides a unified online platform connecting job seekers and employers.
Offers career counselling and vocational guidance services.
Provides access to job fairs, skill development opportunities and employment information.
Facilitates online job search and application across multiple sectors.
Integrates employment exchanges through a digital platform.
application_steps: Visit the National Career Service portal.
Register as a job seeker using the required details.
Complete the profile with educational and employment information.
Upload resume and supporting documents.
Search and apply for suitable job opportunities.
Participate in interviews, counselling sessions or job fairs as applicable.
summary_text: National Career Service (NCS) is a Ministry of Labour and Employment initiative that provides a digital employment platform connecting job seekers, employers, career counsellors and training providers through online employment services and career guidance.

benefits: Provides a guaranteed monthly pension of ₹3,000 after attaining 60 years of age.
Requires matching contribution from the Government of India.
Supports social security for small and marginal farmers.
Offers family pension benefits to the spouse as per scheme guidelines.
Enrollment is available through Common Service Centres across the country.
required_documents: Land Records or Farmer Registration Proof
application_steps: Visit the nearest Common Service Centre (CSC).
Provide Aadhaar, bank account and land details.
Complete biometric authentication and enrollment.
Choose the applicable monthly contribution.
Authorize auto-debit from the linked bank account.
Receive enrollment confirmation and pension card.
summary_text: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Maandhan Yojana (PM-KMY) is a voluntary contributory pension scheme that provides eligible small and marginal farmers with a guaranteed monthly pension of ₹3,000 after the age of 60 through joint contributions from the subscriber and the Government of India.

scheme_name: Mission for Integrated Development of Horticulture
benefits: Provides financial assistance for horticulture development activities.
Supports cultivation of fruits, vegetables, spices, flowers and plantation crops.
Assists in creation of nurseries, protected cultivation and post-harvest infrastructure.
Promotes adoption of improved production technologies.
Enhances farmer income through diversification into horticulture.
required_documents: Land Ownership Records or Cultivation Proof
application_steps: Contact the District Horticulture Office or State Horticulture Department.
Identify the eligible MIDH component.
Submit the prescribed application form with supporting documents.
Complete field inspection and verification by the implementing authority.
Receive approval and financial assistance under the scheme.
Implement the approved horticulture activity and comply with monitoring requirements.
summary_text: Mission for Integrated Development of Horticulture (MIDH) is a Centrally Sponsored Scheme that promotes holistic growth of the horticulture sector through financial assistance for production, post-harvest management, protected cultivation, infrastructure development and capacity building.

scheme_name: National Horticulture Board Capital Investment Subsidy Scheme

eligibility_rules.occupation: Farmer, Entrepreneur, Farmer Producer Organization or Cooperative

benefits: Provides capital investment subsidy for development of commercial horticulture projects.
Supports establishment and modernization of cold storage infrastructure.
Promotes scientific post-harvest management of horticultural produce.
Encourages private sector investment in horticulture.
Improves value addition and reduces post-harvest losses.
application_steps: Visit the National Horticulture Board portal.
Identify the eligible subsidy component.
Submit the online application along with the project report and supporting documents.
Complete inspection and verification by the designated authority.
Receive project approval and implement the sanctioned project.
Claim subsidy after completion as per scheme guidelines.
summary_text: The National Horticulture Board Capital Investment Subsidy Scheme promotes commercial horticulture, post-harvest infrastructure and cold chain development by providing capital investment assistance to eligible farmers, entrepreneurs and organizations.

scheme_name: PM Formalisation of Micro Food Processing Enterprises Scheme

eligibility_rules.occupation: Micro Food Processing Entrepreneur, Self Help Group, Farmer Producer Organization or Cooperative

benefits: Provides credit-linked capital subsidy for eligible micro food processing enterprises.
Supports technology upgradation and modernization of food processing units.
Promotes branding, marketing and quality improvement of local food products.
Encourages the 'One District One Product' approach for value addition.
Provides entrepreneurship and capacity-building support to beneficiaries.
application_steps: Visit the PMFME portal or contact the District Resource Person.
Register under the appropriate beneficiary category.
Submit the application with the required documents and project proposal.
Application is evaluated by the State Nodal Agency.
Obtain bank loan approval where applicable.
Receive subsidy and implement the approved food processing project.
summary_text: The PM Formalisation of Micro Food Processing Enterprises (PMFME) Scheme supports individual micro food processing units, Self Help Groups, Farmer Producer Organizations and cooperatives through credit-linked subsidy, technology upgradation, branding and capacity building to strengthen the food processing sector.

benefits: Promotes efficient water use through the 'Per Drop More Crop' component.
Provides financial assistance for micro-irrigation systems such as drip and sprinkler irrigation.
Supports creation of irrigation infrastructure and water conservation measures.
Improves irrigation coverage and crop productivity.
Encourages sustainable water resource management in agriculture.
required_documents: Land Ownership Records or Cultivation Proof
application_steps: Visit the District Agriculture or Horticulture Office.
Identify the eligible PMKSY component applicable to the farm.
Submit the prescribed application form with supporting documents.
Field verification is conducted by the concerned department.
Receive approval for subsidy under the eligible component.
Install the approved irrigation system and receive financial assistance as per scheme guidelines.
summary_text: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchai Yojana (PMKSY) aims to improve water use efficiency, expand irrigation coverage and promote sustainable agriculture through micro-irrigation, water conservation and irrigation infrastructure development.

scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi
benefits: Provides collateral-free working capital loans to eligible street vendors.
Offers interest subsidy for timely loan repayment.
Rewards regular digital transactions through cashback incentives.
Allows access to higher loan amounts on successful repayment of previous loans.
Supports livelihood restoration and financial inclusion of street vendors.
required_documents: Vendor Certificate or Letter of Recommendation from Urban Local Body
application_steps: Visit the PM SVANidhi portal or the nearest Urban Local Body or Common Service Centre.
Complete the online application form.
Submit the required identity and vendor-related documents.
Application is verified by the Urban Local Body and lending institution.
Loan is sanctioned upon approval.
Repay the loan on time to become eligible for interest subsidy and enhanced loan limits.
summary_text: Pradhan Mantri Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi) provides collateral-free working capital loans, interest subsidy and digital transaction incentives to eligible street vendors, helping them restore and expand their businesses.

benefits: Provides financial assistance for improving production of rice, wheat, pulses, coarse cereals and nutri-cereals.
Promotes adoption of improved seeds, farm machinery and modern cultivation practices.
Supports demonstrations, capacity building and farmer training programmes.
Enhances soil fertility and crop productivity through scientific farming techniques.
Contributes towards national food security and sustainable agricultural growth.
required_documents: Land Ownership Records or Cultivation Proof
application_steps: Contact the District Agriculture Office or Krishi Vigyan Kendra.
Identify the eligible NFSM component applicable to the applicant.
Submit the prescribed application with supporting documents.
Field verification is carried out by the Agriculture Department.
Receive approval under the eligible intervention.
Avail financial assistance, demonstrations or subsidized inputs as applicable.
summary_text: The National Food Security Mission (NFSM) aims to increase the production and productivity of major food crops through improved technologies, quality inputs, capacity building and scientific farm management practices.

benefits: Provides zero-balance basic savings bank accounts for eligible citizens.
Offers RuPay Debit Card with accidental insurance cover as per prevailing scheme provisions.
Enables Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) of government scheme benefits.
Provides access to banking, remittance, pension and insurance services.
Promotes financial inclusion for unbanked households across India.
application_steps: Visit the nearest participating bank or Bank Mitra.
Fill out the PMJDY account opening form.
Submit the required KYC documents.
Complete verification by the bank.
Receive the Jan Dhan account details and RuPay Debit Card.
Link Aadhaar and mobile number to access Direct Benefit Transfer services.
summary_text: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY) is the Government of India's flagship financial inclusion programme that provides every household with access to banking, savings accounts, insurance, pension and Direct Benefit Transfer services through affordable banking facilities.

benefits: Provides a Universal Account Number (UAN) for every registered unorganized worker.
Creates a national database to improve delivery of social security and welfare schemes.
Enables easier access to government benefits meant for unorganized workers.
Facilitates portability of worker information across states.
Supports integration with future welfare and employment initiatives.
application_steps: Visit the e-Shram portal or the nearest Common Service Centre (CSC).
Complete Aadhaar-based registration.
Provide occupation, address and bank account details.
Submit the application for verification.
Receive the e-Shram Universal Account Number (UAN).
Download or print the e-Shram card for future use.
summary_text: e-Shram is a Government of India initiative that creates a national database of unorganized workers by issuing a Universal Account Number (UAN), enabling better access to social security schemes and welfare benefits.

benefits: Provides temporary shelter and rehabilitation for women in difficult circumstances.
Offers food, clothing, healthcare and counselling services.
Provides legal aid, vocational training and skill development.
Supports economic and social reintegration through livelihood assistance.
Promotes rehabilitation in a safe and secure environment.
required_documents: Referral Letter or Case Record (where applicable)
application_steps: Approach the nearest Swadhar Greh or District Women and Child Development Office.
Submit the prescribed application or referral documents.
Complete eligibility assessment by the implementing authority.
Receive admission to the Swadhar Greh facility upon approval.
Avail shelter, counselling, healthcare and rehabilitation services.
Participate in vocational training and reintegration programmes as applicable.
summary_text: The Swadhar Greh Scheme provides institutional support, shelter, counselling, healthcare, legal assistance and vocational training to women in difficult circumstances, helping them achieve rehabilitation and social reintegration.

benefits: Provides free vaccination against vaccine-preventable diseases under the Universal Immunization Programme.
Focuses on children who are unvaccinated or partially vaccinated.
Improves immunization coverage in high-risk and underserved areas.
