Provides immunization services for pregnant women as per national guidelines.
Reduces infant and maternal mortality through timely vaccination.
required_documents: Identity Proof of Parent or Guardian
application_steps: Visit the nearest Government Health Centre, Primary Health Centre or Anganwadi Centre.
Register the child or pregnant woman for immunization.
Carry the Mother and Child Protection Card during each vaccination visit.
Receive vaccines according to the National Immunization Schedule.
Attend follow-up vaccination sessions as scheduled.
Maintain the vaccination record for future reference.
summary_text: Mission Indradhanush is a flagship immunization initiative under the National Health Mission that aims to achieve full immunization coverage for children and pregnant women by ensuring timely vaccination against vaccine-preventable diseases.

scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Jan Aushadhi Kendra Entrepreneurship Scheme

eligibility_rules.occupation: Entrepreneur, Pharmacist, NGO, Trust or Institution

benefits: Provides an opportunity to establish a Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Kendra.
Offers financial incentives as per scheme guidelines for eligible Kendras.
Promotes availability of affordable quality generic medicines.
Supports entrepreneurship in the healthcare sector.
Contributes to employment generation while improving access to affordable medicines.
application_steps: Visit the PMBI (Pharmaceuticals & Medical Devices Bureau of India) portal.
Submit the online application for opening a Janaushadhi Kendra.
Upload the required business and pharmacist documents.
Complete verification by PMBI.
Execute the agreement after approval.
Establish and operate the Janaushadhi Kendra as per PMBI guidelines.
summary_text: The Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Jan Aushadhi Kendra Entrepreneurship Scheme enables eligible entrepreneurs, pharmacists and institutions to establish Janaushadhi Kendras that provide quality generic medicines at affordable prices while promoting healthcare entrepreneurship.

benefits: Provides a voluntary long-term retirement savings platform for Indian citizens.
Offers market-linked investment options with professional fund management.
Allows partial withdrawals and annuity purchase as per prevailing regulations.
Provides tax benefits under applicable provisions of the Income Tax Act.
Creates a Permanent Retirement Account Number (PRAN) for every subscriber.
application_steps: Visit the eNPS portal or an authorized Point of Presence (PoP).
Complete the online or offline registration process.
Submit the required KYC documents.
Choose the preferred pension fund and investment option.
Make the initial contribution to activate the PRAN.
Continue periodic contributions as per the selected plan.
summary_text: The National Pension Scheme (NPS) is a voluntary, market-linked retirement savings scheme regulated by the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority (PFRDA), enabling individuals to build a retirement corpus through regular contributions.

eligibility_rules.occupation: Graduate, Diploma Holder or Vocational Student

benefits: Provides one-year apprenticeship training in government and private organizations.
Offers practical industry exposure to improve employability.
Provides stipend support during the apprenticeship period as per applicable guidelines.
Bridges the gap between academic education and industry requirements.
Enhances employment opportunities through recognized apprenticeship experience.
application_steps: Visit the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme portal.
Register as a student and complete the profile.
Upload educational and identity documents.
Apply for available apprenticeship opportunities.
Accept the apprenticeship offer after selection.
Complete the apprenticeship training and receive the certificate.
summary_text: The National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) is a Government of India programme that provides practical, industry-based training to graduates, diploma holders and vocational students, helping them gain employable skills through structured apprenticeship opportunities.

eligibility_rules.occupation: Dairy Farmer, Milk Producer, Dairy Cooperative or Farmer Producer Organization

benefits: Strengthens village-level dairy infrastructure and milk procurement systems.
Supports establishment and modernization of milk collection and processing facilities.
Improves quality testing, chilling and storage infrastructure.
Enhances market access and income opportunities for dairy farmers.
Promotes organized dairy development through cooperatives and producer organizations.
required_documents: Dairy Cooperative or FPO Registration (if applicable)
application_steps: Contact the State Animal Husbandry or Dairy Development Department.
Identify the eligible component under the programme.
Submit the prescribed application with supporting documents.
Complete technical and field verification by the implementing authority.
Receive approval for the eligible intervention.
Implement the sanctioned project and utilize assistance as per programme guidelines.
summary_text: The National Programme for Dairy Development (NPDD) strengthens the dairy sector by improving milk procurement, quality testing, processing infrastructure and market access, thereby increasing the productivity and income of dairy farmers.

eligibility_rules.occupation: Micro, Small or Medium Enterprise Owner

benefits: Provides official recognition as a Micro, Small or Medium Enterprise.
Enables access to various Central and State Government MSME schemes.
Facilitates easier access to priority sector lending and government procurement opportunities.
Simplifies the registration process through a fully online self-declaration system.
Supports eligibility for subsidies, incentives and credit guarantee schemes.
application_steps: Visit the Udyam Registration portal.
Complete Aadhaar-based online registration.
Provide PAN, business and enterprise details.
Submit the self-declaration form.
Registration is verified electronically through government databases.
Download the Udyam Registration Certificate after successful registration.
summary_text: Udyam Registration is the official online registration system for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) that provides formal recognition and enables eligible enterprises to access government schemes, financial assistance and procurement benefits.
